text.div:
Generated Narrative: StructureDefinition AA12Model

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
AA12Model 0..*Base長期照護醫師意見書 (AA12) 邏輯模型
formHeader 1..1BackboneElement表單基本資料
formDate 1..1date填表日期
formNumber 0..1string表單編號
applicant 1..1BackboneElement申請者基本資料
name 1..1string申請者姓名
idNumber 1..1string身分證字號
birthDate 1..1date出生日期
gender 1..1code性別
address 1..1string住址
phone 0..1string聯絡電話
physician 1..1BackboneElement醫師基本資料
name 1..1string醫師姓名
institutionName 1..1string醫療機構名稱
institutionAddress 1..1string醫療機構地址
institutionPhone 0..1string醫療機構電話
institutionFax 0..1string醫療機構傳真
basicInformation 1..1BackboneElement基本資料
lastConsultationDate 1..1date最近一次診察日期
opinionCount 1..1BackboneElement製作意見書次數
previousOpinionDate 0..1date前次意見書日期
consultationDepartments 0..*BackboneElement目前診察科別
diseaseDiagnosis 1..1BackboneElement相關疾病診斷意見
diseases 1..*BackboneElement診斷疾病
diseaseName 1..1string疾病名稱
icdCode 0..1stringICD代碼
onsetDate 1..1date發病日期
conditionStatus 1..1BackboneElement病情狀態
unstableReason 0..1string不穩定狀態說明
recentTreatment 0..*BackboneElement近期治療
treatmentType 1..1BackboneElement治療類型
otherTreatment 0..1string其他重要治療
medicalCareOpinion 1..1BackboneElement醫事照護意見
carePrecautions 0..*BackboneElement照顧應注意事項及處置方法
precautionType 1..1BackboneElement注意事項類型
otherPrecaution 0..1string其他注意事項
treatmentSuggestions 0..1string處置建議
recommendedServices 0..*BackboneElement建議介入之醫事照護服務
serviceType 1..1BackboneElement服務類型
otherService 0..1string其他醫事照護服務
sixMonthImpact 0..1string最近六個月內可能影響長照服務使用狀況
infectiousDisease 0..1BackboneElement罹患感染症
hasInfectiousDisease 1..1BackboneElement是否罹患感染症
diseaseName 0..1string感染症病名
isolationRequired 0..1boolean是否需要隔離
isolationType 0..*BackboneElement隔離類型
physicalMentalStatus 0..1string身心狀態或特殊需要註記事項

Documentation for this format

name: AA12Model
title: 長期照護醫師意見書 (AA12) 邏輯模型
description: 此邏輯模型以衛生福利部 AA12 長期照護醫師意見書為基礎，用以描述醫師意見書的資料結構與欄位準備指引。

element.short: Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
element.definition:
May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.

Modifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself).
element.comment: There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone.
element.requirements: Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension).

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.isModifierReason: Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them

element.short: 身心狀態或特殊需要註記事項

element.short: 長期照護醫師意見書 (AA12) 邏輯模型
element.definition: 此邏輯模型以衛生福利部 AA12 長期照護醫師意見書為基礎，用以描述醫師意見書的資料結構與欄位準備指引。
醫師意見書表單的基本資訊
申請長期照護服務的個案資訊
填寫意見書的醫師資訊
填寫意見書的醫師姓名
醫師所屬的醫療機構名稱
醫師意見書的基本資料
前次意見書的日期（若非初次）
病情不穩定時的詳細說明

element.short: 照顧應注意事項及處置方法

element.definition: 其他未列出的注意事項
